riskThresholds.description: Apply to all domains consistently across all grades and assessments

crisisProtocols.name: IMMEDIATE DANGER
actions: Counselor speaks with student within 30 minutes
Emergency family contact - request immediate family presence
Professional referral - psychiatrist/psychologist within 24 hours
Safety planning - comprehensive plan with 24/7 support contacts
Academic emergency - temporary suspension if needed for safety
Intensive monitoring - hourly check-ins, family supervision

crisisProtocols.name: HIGH RISK
actions: Crisis team activation - Principal, counselor, family, mental health professional within 12 hours
Immediate intervention - Professional counseling session within 24 hours
Family crisis intervention - Intensive family therapy and support
Academic accommodations - Modified schedule if needed
Medical evaluation - Physical health assessment due to stress symptoms
Professional support - Daily counselor contact, weekly professional sessions

crisisProtocols.name: MODERATE RISK
actions: Counselor intervention - Mandatory meeting within 48 hours
Family conference - Required family meeting to discuss support strategies
Stress management program - Intensive coping skills training
Peer support - Connection with support groups or peer mentoring
Academic support - Tutoring, study skills support, reduced pressure
Regular monitoring - Twice weekly check-ins, progress tracking

crisisProtocols.name: MILD CONCERN
actions: Resource provision - Self-help materials, stress management apps, online resources
Peer connection - Encourage participation in supportive peer groups
Parent education - Information about supporting teenagers
Academic support - Study skills workshops, time management training
Monitoring - Weekly check-ins for one month

autoRedTriggers.description: Automatic critical flags that override standard scoring

triggers.condition: Often or Always responses, or any Yes to ideation questions
No to feeling safe at home

annualOutcomeCategories.description: Overall category based on average score across all assessments in academic year

categories.studentMessage: You had a solid year with resilience!
This was tough but you made it!
recommendedActions: Flagged for early check-in next year
